summary: First-iteration E2E test of A Yard Apparel app. Backend (14 pytest tests) and Frontend (homepage, shop, filters, product detail, cart drawer, checkout with manual + Stripe, success page, about, newsletter, header nav incl. A YARD/MEDICAL/ISU/STORY, mobile menu) all PASS. Stripe session creation returns a valid checkout.stripe.com URL and Stripe redirect works. Manual order flow redirects to /success?manual=1&order_id=.... 88 products are seeded correctly (11 designs x 8 categories).

minor.issue: Address line 2 not captured from frontend (frontend only sends address_line1). Optional, low impact.

issues: Radix Dialog warning: 'Missing Description or aria-describedby for {DialogContent}'. Add a <SheetDescription> or aria-describedby for a11y.

action_items: (Optional, low priority) Add aria-describedby/SheetDescription to CartDrawer Sheet to silence Radix warning.
(Optional) Migrate startup hook to FastAPI lifespan handler.
(Optional) Pass address_line2 from Checkout form to backend (backend already accepts it).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is a single ~540 LOC file mixing models, seed data, product, checkout, webhook, order, newsletter. Acceptable now but extract into routers/models packages as it grows.
_id is correctly excluded everywhere via projection {'_id': 0}. Good.
All env vars (MONGO_URL, DB_NAME, STRIPE_API_KEY, REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL) are read from env without defaults. Good.
Newsletter endpoint has no email validation (any string accepted). Consider EmailStr.
Checkout/session does not validate empty items list before _calc_totals (would still 400 via total<=0 check — OK).
Stripe webhook secret not configured/verified explicitly in code (handled inside emergentintegrations).
seed_data_creation: Backend seeds 88 products on startup automatically; verified via /api/products count.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All data-testids match spec. Note: header nav links share text with the brand logo ('A YARD APPAREL' vs 'A YARD' link). Use header a[href*='design=dumpster_fire'] or nav-scoped selector to avoid hitting the logo. checkout-state is a <select>, use select_option not fill. Manual checkout test creates TEST_ orders in DB; clean periodically. Stripe checkout uses sk_test_emergent and redirects to checkout.stripe.com — don't complete the card form.
rca of the issue: No defects found. One initial Playwright miss caused by selecting the brand logo (text 'A YARD APPAREL') as the first match for 'A YARD' role link. Re-tested with href-scoped selector — A YARD nav correctly routes to /shop?design=dumpster_fire and renders 8 cards.
